name: Marty Feins' Hot Sour Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cloud ears and golden needles for 20 minutes in warm water. Reserve the soaking water.
2. Shred the cloud ears and halve the golden needles.
3. Shred the roast pork.
4. Combine the shredded pork, 2 tablespoons of cornstarch mixed with sherry, set aside.
5. Mix vinegar, white pepper, hot oil, and sesame oil in a bowl.
6. Bring chicken stock to a boil, add salt and light soy sauce. Add the pork-chicken mixture to the boiling stock and cook for 1 minute.
7. Add tofu, needles, and ears to the pot. Cook for another minute.
8. Mix the remaining cornstarch with water (using the reserved soaking water) and add it to the soup. Lower the heat.
9. Add the vinegar mixture and adjust seasoning as needed.
10. Slowly stir in beaten eggs.
11. Garnish with sliced scallions.
12. Serve hot in individual bowls.
